body.title: Watchdog → known-safe mode on prolonged NE stuck
body.result: safe_mode.py + COA watchdog: trip at IGOR_DEGRADE_SAFE_THRESHOLD (30) cycles, writes flag to switches.cfg, cc_inbox alert
body.description:
With Akien away through 05-25, a prolonged NE stuck cycle (>30 cycles or >2h) should trip a watchdog that drops Igor to a degraded-safe mode (SELF_EDIT off, dreaming-write off, action-tools off; reads still allowed) and writes a high-priority entry to cc_inbox.jsonl. No email alert — that path is blocked pending Igor becoming goal-oriented enough to self-configure it.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py or narrative_engine.py (watchdog hook), wild_igor/igor/env_sync.py or igor.switches.cfg (safe-mode gate writes), lab/claudecode/cc_inbox.py (alert write)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; safe-mode transition is human-reset-only — no auto-recovery
**Scope boundary:** in scope: one watchdog (stuck cycle count threshold), one safe-mode env transition (writes IGOR_SAFE_MODE=true to switches.cfg), one cc_inbox.jsonl high-priority write. Out of scope: email/Gmail alerts, auto-recovery from safe mode, UI changes, TURN_PIPELINE or ARBITER gates.
**Test plan:** unit test watchdog fires at threshold; integration test safe-mode flag written and SELF_EDIT gate consulted from switches.cfg after write; test cc_inbox.jsonl entry created with urgency=high.
